steps.title: Express the weight as a function of volume
steps.content: The total weight $x$ equals the weight per cubic foot times the volume. Since the weight per cubic foot is 165 pounds and the volume is $V$ cubic feet: $$x = 165V$$ The volume constraint given is: $$12.7 < V < 15.7$$

steps.title: Transform the volume inequality to a weight inequality
steps.content: Multiply all parts of the volume inequality by 165 to get the weight inequality: $$165(12.7) < 165V < 165(15.7)$$ Substituting $x = 165V$: $$165(12.7) < x < 165(15.7)$$ That matches choice C — C is correct.
